title: Using formula column for Goal Setting widget
excerpt: Goal Setting widget currently only lets you use a Numbers column to measure against goal. I’d like to use a formula column instead because the goal I want to measure against is a weighted probability between a numbers co…

posts.author: mlankford (Marlena Lankford)
posts.cookedHtml: Goal Setting widget currently only lets you use a Numbers column to measure against goal. I’d like to use a formula column instead because the goal I want to measure against is a weighted probability between a numbers column (a price) and a probability % (a probability of a deal happening) which gets to a wtd avg price column that is a formula.
